toolcall.title: View failed logs for latest run
Extract key linker errors from logs

content.oldText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          g++ -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -pthread -licui18n -licuuc -licudata
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm
content.newText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          g++ -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            -Wl,--start-group v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -Wl,--end-group \
            -Wl,-z,ignore \
            -pthread
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm

toolcall.title: Check order of errors in build log

content.oldText: gn gen out/release --args='is_debug=false v8_enable_disassembler=true v8_enable_object_print=true v8_enable_pointer_compression=true v8_monolithic=true v8_use_external_startup_data=false treat_warnings_as_errors=false v8_enable_i18n_support=true'
content.newText: gn gen out/release --args='is_debug=false v8_enable_disassembler=true v8_enable_object_print=true v8_enable_pointer_compression=true v8_monolithic=true v8_use_external_startup_data=false treat_warnings_as_errors=false v8_enable_i18n_support=true use_crel=false'
